nl_query: Count the number of faculty_course_mapping entries per academic year.
failed_sql:
SELECT academic_year, COUNT(*) AS faculty_course_mapping_count
FROM faculty_course_mapping
WHERE is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY faculty_course_mapping_count DESC;
